prompt: We just finished implementing core/config for @m3l-automation/m3l-common. Today is 2026-06-30. Write the work log. [full context about 8 symbols, 47 tests, 211 suite total, 100% coverage, 4 review spokes, 2 divergences]

assertions.text: Summary section includes test count (47/211), coverage %, and at least 3 CI gates
Summary includes a verdict for each of the 4 review spokes
What didn't go as planned has exactly 2 numbered items (ConfigValidationError type + provenance sidecar)
Each numbered divergence item contains 'Why it happened:' and 'Fix for future:' sub-sections
Lessons learned bullets each start with **bold keyword**
Plan of record link to docs/plans/core-config-implementation.md is present
File does not contain YAML frontmatter (no '---' block at top)
